title: erigeron × stanleyi
intro: Erigeron × stanleyi, also known as Stanley's fleabane, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the daisy family. It has been used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of essential oils and flavonoids. The medicinal properties of Stanley's fleabane have been found to provide relief from various health issues, including wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems, as well as having antimicrobial and antioxidant effects. The plant is traditionally prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and its herbal preparations have been used to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and promote overall well-being.
